column1:
create or replace TABLE CERTIFICATION_DETAILS (
	CERTIFICATION_ID NUMBER(38,0),
	EMPLOYEE_ID NUMBER(38,0),
	CERTIFICATION_NAME VARCHAR(200),
	ISSUING_ORGANIZATION VARCHAR(100),
	CERTIFICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR(100),
	CERTIFICATION_DATE DATE,
	EXPIRY_DATE DATE,
	CERTIFICATION_STATUS VARCHAR(30),
	CREDENTIAL_ID VARCHAR(50),
	VERIFICATION_URL VARCHAR(300),
	COST_COVERED_BY VARCHAR(30),
	CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP_NTZ(9)
);
